case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. SERGIO CERVANTES MENDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, SERGIO CERVANTES DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-01-2008

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2008 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, SERGIO CERVANTES $18,095.20 PRINCIPAL, $2,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $644.80 INTEREST, $386.46 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,276.46, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS THE OWNER OF ONE 2001 FREIGHTLINER FLD132 VIN # 1FUJAPCG41LG75476 IN EVENT PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION OF AND SELL SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY HEREAFTER, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDIT.SEE SCANNED DOC
